title: Verisk (VRSK) to Report Q1 Earnings: Here's What to Expect
text: Strong segmental performance is likely to have bode well for Verisk (VRSK) in the first quarter of 2023.

title: Verisk Acquires German InsurTech SV Krug, Expands European Motor Solutions
text: Acquisition further accelerates Verisk's growth to support the global insurance industry Acquisition further accelerates Verisk's growth to support the global insurance industry

title: Verisk Maplecroft collaborating with LGIM to power new Sovereign ESG Index funds offering
text: London, UK, April 20, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Verisk Maplecroft, Verisk's (Nasdaq: VRSK) global risk analytics business, has today announced a new collaboration with Legal & General Investment Management (LGIM), one of Europe's largest asset managers, to power a new slate of investment products. LGIM plans to utilise the depth, breadth and accuracy of Verisk Maplecroft's portfolio of ESG risk analytics, which outperformed alternative data across a broad set of criteria, to develop Sovereign ESG Index funds.

title: Peace Hills General Insurance Company Enhances Claims Management with Verisk Solutions
text: With Verisk's Xactimate and XactAnalysis, Personal and Commercial Lines Insurer from Western Canada Streamlines Estimates and Workflow processes. With Verisk's Xactimate and XactAnalysis, Personal and Commercial Lines Insurer from Western Canada Streamlines Estimates and Workflow processes.

title: Verisk Promotes Carrie Barr and Aaron Brunko to Lead Growing Claims Businesses
text: JERSEY CITY, N.J., April 13, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Verisk (Nasdaq: VRSK), a leading global data analytics and technology provider, has promoted Carrie Barr to president of Casualty Solutions and Aaron Brunko to president of Property Estimating Solutions. Both businesses are part of Verisk's Claims Solutions group.

title: Verisk to Announce Fiscal First-Quarter 2023 Results on May 3, 2023
text: JERSEY CITY, N.J., April 12, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Verisk (Nasdaq: VRSK), a leading global data analytics and technology provider, will report its financial results for the fiscal first quarter ended March 31, 2023, on Wednesday, May 3, 2023, before the market open. The press release, with accompanying financial information, will be posted on the Verisk investor website at  http://investor.verisk.com .

title: Verisk: Get Long The Breakout
text: Verisk appears to have broken out. So long as support holds, the stock is a long.

title: Verisk Reimagines Insurance Product Innovation with New Rating Engine
text: With Verisk's Rating-as-a-Service (RaaS), Insurers Can Seamlessly Implement the Latest ISO Loss Costs, Rules and Coverage Updates into New Commercial Lines Offerings With Verisk's Rating-as-a-Service (RaaS), Insurers Can Seamlessly Implement the Latest ISO Loss Costs, Rules and Coverage Updates into New Commercial Lines Offerings

title: Verisk Publishes 2022 Corporate Social Responsibility Report
text: Jersey City, N.J., April 10, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Verisk (Nasdaq: VRSK), a leading global data analytics and technology provider, has published its annual  Corporate Social Responsibility Report . Focused on working together to build global resilience for individuals, communities and businesses, the company's report offers a view into Verisk's ESG journey and progress toward maximizing value for stakeholders.

title: Why Verisk Analytics Stock Jumped 12.1% in March
text: The data analytics firm for the insurance industry got several analyst upgrades following its quarterly earnings release. Verisk plans to buy back $2.5 billion in stock this year.

title: Verisk Names Chris Sawford Managing Director of Claims for the UK
text: Supports global insurance market with automated solutions to manage impacts of inflation Supports global insurance market with automated solutions to manage impacts of inflation

title: Verisk Grows Premium and Loss Database for Third Consecutive Year
text: More than 100 Property and Casualty (P&C) Insurers Commit to Contributing Statistical Data in Past Three Years; New Additions Will Increase the Size of Verisk's Industry-Leading Source of Advanced Insurance Analytics by More than 25 Percent More than 100 Property and Casualty (P&C) Insurers Commit to Contributing Statistical Data in Past Three Years; New Additions Will Increase the Size of Verisk's Industry-Leading Source of Advanced Insurance Analytics by More than 25 Percent

title: Verisk Named One of UK's Best Workplaces for Wellbeing™ by Great Place to Work®
text: LONDON, April 05, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Leading global data analytics and technology provider Verisk (Nasdaq: VRSK) has been recognised as one of the UK's Best Workplaces™ for Wellbeing by Great Place to Work®, the global authority on workplace culture. This honour is based entirely on what current employees say about their experience working at Verisk.

title: Verisk (VRSK) Benefits From Growth Strategy and Acquisitions
text: Organic growth and acquisition benefits are the key drivers for Verisk Analytics' (VRSK) growth. Operational risks are a concern.
